'''âk-z-v''' ('''kazava''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wordify|wordify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-z-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wordify|wordify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-z-v
|-
! Lemma
| kazava
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kazavithi|kazavithi]] || [[word:kazaviji|kazaviji]] || [[word:kazavishi|kazavishi]] || [[word:kazavi|kazavi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kazavuthuth|kazavuthuth]] || [[word:kazavujuj|kazavujuj]] || [[word:kazavushush|kazavushush]] || [[word:kazav|kazav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kazavuthu|kazavuthu]] || [[word:kazavuju|kazavuju]] || [[word:kazavushu|kazavushu]] || [[word:kazavu|kazavu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kazavufuth|kazavufuth]] || [[word:kazavufuj|kazavufuj]] || [[word:kazavufush|kazavufush]] || [[word:kazavuf|kazavuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kazavethe|kazavethe]] || [[word:kazaveje|kazaveje]] || [[word:kazaveshe|kazaveshe]] || [[word:kazave|kazave]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kazavothoth|kazavothoth]] || [[word:kazavojoj|kazavojoj]] || [[word:kazavoshosh|kazavoshosh]] || [[word:kazav|kazav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kazavotho|kazavotho]] || [[word:kazavojo|kazavojo]] || [[word:kazavosho|kazavosho]] || [[word:kazavo|kazavo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kazavofoth|kazavofoth]] || [[word:kazavofoj|kazavofoj]] || [[word:kazavofosh|kazavofosh]] || [[word:kazavof|kazavof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kazavĂŠthĂŠ|kazavĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:kazavĂŠjĂŠ|kazavĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:kazavĂŠshĂŠ|kazavĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:kazavĂŠ|kazavĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kazavathath|kazavathath]] || [[word:kazavajaj|kazavajaj]] || [[word:kazavashash|kazavashash]] || [[word:kazav|kazav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kazavatha|kazavatha]] || [[word:kazavaja|kazavaja]] || [[word:kazavasha|kazavasha]] || [[word:kazava|kazava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kazavafath|kazavafath]] || [[word:kazavafaj|kazavafaj]] || [[word:kazavafash|kazavafash]] || [[word:kazavaf|kazavaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:kazavasha|kazavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gokazavasha|gokazavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokikazavasha|gokikazavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:kazavnĂŒsha|kazavnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokazavnknĂŒsha|gokazavnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokikazavnĂŒsha|gokikazavnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kazavshĂ«sha|kazavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokazavnkshĂ«sha|gokazavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikazavshĂ«sha|gokikazavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kazavrosha|kazavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokazavnkrosha|gokazavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikazavrosha|gokikazavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kazavmusha|kazavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokazavnkmusha|gokazavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikazavmusha|gokikazavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:kazavsherasha|kazavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokazavnksherasha|gokazavnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokikazavsherasha|gokikazavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:kazavngasha|kazavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokazavnkngasha|gokazavnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokikazavngasha|gokikazavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kazavyasha|kazavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokazavnkyasha|gokazavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokikazavyasha|gokikazavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:kazavyamasha|kazavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokazavnkyamasha|gokazavnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokikazavyamasha|gokikazavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:kazavnĂŒshĂ«sha|kazavnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokazavnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gokazavnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikazavnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokikazavnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kazavnĂŒrosha|kazavnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokazavnknĂŒrosha|gokazavnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikazavnĂŒrosha|gokikazavnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kazavnĂŒmusha|kazavnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokazavnknĂŒmusha|gokazavnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikazavnĂŒmusha|gokikazavnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:kazavshĂ«nĂŒsha|kazavshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokazavnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokazavnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikazavshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokikazavshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kazavshĂ«rosha|kazavshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokazavnkshĂ«rosha|gokazavnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikazavshĂ«rosha|gokikazavshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kazavshĂ«musha|kazavshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokazavnkshĂ«musha|gokazavnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikazavshĂ«musha|gokikazavshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:kazavronĂŒsha|kazavronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokazavnkronĂŒsha|gokazavnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikazavronĂŒsha|gokikazavronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:kazavroshĂ«sha|kazavroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokazavnkroshĂ«sha|gokazavnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikazavroshĂ«sha|gokikazavroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kazavromusha|kazavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokazavnkromusha|gokazavnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikazavromusha|gokikazavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:kazavmunĂŒsha|kazavmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokazavnkmunĂŒsha|gokazavnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikazavmunĂŒsha|gokikazavmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:kazavmushĂ«sha|kazavmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokazavnkmushĂ«sha|gokazavnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikazavmushĂ«sha|gokikazavmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kazavmurosha|kazavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokazavnkmurosha|gokazavnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikazavmurosha|gokikazavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:kazav|kazav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kĂŠzĂŠv|kĂŠzĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hokazav|hokazav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hokĂŠzĂŠv|hokĂŠzĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohokazav|hohokazav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohokĂŠzĂŠv|hohokĂŠzĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒkazav|nĂŒkazav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒkĂŠzĂŠv|nĂŒkĂŠzĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒkazav|nĂŒnĂŒkazav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒkĂŠzĂŠv|nĂŒnĂŒkĂŠzĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻkazav|nĂŻkazav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻkĂŠzĂŠv|nĂŻkĂŠzĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻkazav|nĂŻnĂŻkazav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻkĂŠzĂŠv|nĂŻnĂŻkĂŠzĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lukazav|lukazav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lukĂŠzĂŠv|lukĂŠzĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulukazav|lulukazav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulukĂŠzĂŠv|lulukĂŠzĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:likazav|likazav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:likĂŠzĂŠv|likĂŠzĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilikazav|lilikazav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilikĂŠzĂŠv|lilikĂŠzĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kokazav|kokazav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kokĂŠzĂŠv|kokĂŠzĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokokazav|kokokazav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokokĂŠzĂŠv|kokokĂŠzĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kekazav|kekazav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kekĂŠzĂŠv|kekĂŠzĂŠv]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekekazav|kekekazav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekekĂŠzĂŠv|kekekĂŠzĂŠv]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
